query:
UPDATE position_requisitions SET title = 'Real Estate Manager (Georgia)', requirements = 'Georgia Real Estate Commission license required. Must be licensed broker or agent in good standing.' WHERE title = 'Real Estate Manager (State A)';

UPDATE position_requisitions SET title = 'Real Estate Manager (North Carolina)', requirements = 'North Carolina Real Estate Commission license required. Must be licensed broker or agent in good standing.' WHERE title = 'Real Estate Manager (State B)';
